INV-LARGE-NEW: New vendor, no payment history, £8,000 above the auto-pay threshold. Confirm by phone before sending cash.
INV-SPECTER-DISTRESSED: Specter flags vendor distress at 0.72. Defer past due date and run a relationship call before paying.
INV-FLOOR-BREACH: Pay-on-due breaches the £40k cash floor on day 7. Stretched to next AR receipt; human can override.
INV-FLOOR-BREACH-AFTER-ALERT: Specter alert flipped during the run: vendor now distressed AND payment would have breached floor. Defer 14 days, escalate relationship.
_default: Sub-agents disagree on timing - human decision needed. See per-agent rationale below.
